description:
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS,
Android and desktop apps рџ“±!

Unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX has no identifiers assigned to the users - it does not use phone
numbers (like Signal or WhatsApp), domain-based addresses (like email, XMPP or Matrix), usernames (like Telegram),
public keys or even random numbers (like all other messengers) to identify its users - we do not even know how many
people use SimpleX.
New in v6.4.10:
- improve error handling
The GitHub release build is independently reproduced by:

Commits:
- github/workflows: macos-13 -> macos-15-intel (#6362)
- ios: fix new chat sheet closing on new message in iOS 26 (#6525)
- core: update simplexmq (support any 127.x.x.x address as loopback), show other addresses in CLI during remote connection, update tests (#6526)
- core: 6.4.9.0
- ios: 6.4.9 (build 317)
- docs: update XMR donations address
- multiplatform/common: catch every exception at base64ToBitmap (#6576)
- multiplatform: stop video playback when swiping away (#6588)
- core: improve error handling (#6602)
- core: 6.4.10.0 (simplexmq 6.4.8.0)
- ios: 6.4.10 (build 320)
- v6.4.10: android 333, desktop 130
